part.text:
---
## Goal
- Move AnyAuthenticatedUserId and RecoveryUserId from github.com/hashicorp/boundary/internal/perms to github.com/hashicorp/boundary/globals

## Constraints & Preferences
- Task complete when change is applied everywhere and project still typechecks

## Progress
### Done
- Confirmed AnyAuthenticatedUserId declared at acl.go:12 in internal/perms
- Confirmed RecoveryUserId declared at acl.go:14 in internal/perms  
- Found 4 total references to AnyAuthenticatedUserId across packages daemon/controller/auth, internal/iam, and internal/perms
- Found 10 total references to RecoveryUserId including daemon/controller/auth, daemon/controller/handlers/groups, daemon/controller/handlers/roles, and internal/iam

### In Progress
- Examining globals package structure at github.com/hashicorp/boundary/globals
- Determining proper insertion point in fields.go for new global declarations

### Blocked
- Tool errors when attempting to view globals package files directly (sym receiver type not found)

## Key Decisions
- AnyAuthenticatedUserId and RecoveryUserId are appropriate candidates for globals (global const values used across many packages including auth controllers, handlers, and IAM scope logic)
- AnonymousUserId will remain in internal/perms since it has a more local scope

## Next Steps
- Create or update github.com/hashicorp/boundary/globals/fields.go to add AnyAuthenticatedUserId and RecoveryUserId const declarations after UserIdField at line 16
- Replace all usages of internal/perms.AnyAuthenticatedUserId with globals.AnyAuthenticatedUserId (4 occurrences)
- Replace all usages of internal/perms.RecoveryUserId with globals.RecoveryUserId (10 occurrences)
- Update import paths in affected packages
- Run go build to verify typechecks pass

## Critical Context
- Both constants are const types (not functions or variables)
- AnyAuthenticatedUserId currently defined as: "const AnyAuthenticatedUserId = \"*\" at acl.go:12
- RecoveryUserId currently defined as: "const RecoveryUserId = \"*\" at acl.go:14  
- References spread across internal/daemon/controller/auth, internal/iam (repository_scope.go), and multiple daemon controller handler packages
- Globals package already exists with fields.go containing UserIdField const at line 16

## Relevant Files
- /private/var/folders/9f/txt0j2rs2wx3lqx9vfj9x3240000gn/T/BenchmarkRenameqwen3.5-9b-udq4boundary.../005/boundary/internal/perms/acl.go (original declarations)
- github.com/hashicorp/boundary/globals/fields.go (target for new declarations)
- internal/daemon/controller/auth/testing.go (AnyAuthenticatedUserId usage at line 24)
- internal/iam/repository_scope.go (both usages - AnyAuthenticatedUserId at line 90, RecoveryUserId at line 91)
